summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. All five refs are open pull requests with useful, distinct change sets; no shared canonical was provided or inferred, and no close, merge, fix, or security-route action is recommended.

actions.reason: Distinct Slack behavior/config PR with useful code and unresolved proof/compatibility gates; keep it independent for normal maintainer review.
Substantive path-formatting fix with a dirty branch and author-followup state; keep it independent rather than closing or merging.
Distinct ACP/provider behavior PR with compatibility and auth-provider review risk; keep it independent for maintainer review.
Maintainer-owned draft with focused useful code; keep it independent and leave normal draft review flow intact.
Maintainer-owned draft with focused useful code on a distinct agent-runtime surface; keep it independent and leave normal author/maintainer follow-up intact.
